description:
## What to build

Add the frontend half of the first issue-list slice. Replace the starter screen with the issue explorer shell shown in `docs/research/design/mockups/issue_explorer_functional_sidebar.png`: left navigation, middle issue list pane, and right empty-detail pane.

Load issue summaries from the backend Tauri command produced by `bsm-8ul`. Use the command name and TypeScript-facing success/error contract documented by that backend task. Render true empty and error states from that command while keeping the shell mounted. Display the returned `workspacePath` read-only. Add Lucide for shell iconography. Use shadcn only if this task introduces reusable base components that should come from shadcn; otherwise defer shadcn setup.

Search, sidebar state filters, workspace switching, issue selection, and issue detail behavior remain visual or empty-state only. Only listing all issues is in scope.

## Acceptance criteria

- [ ] The starter Tauri screen is replaced by the three-pane issue explorer shell from `docs/research/design/mockups/issue_explorer_functional_sidebar.png`.
- [ ] The issue list renders data from the backend `IssueSummary` command produced by `bsm-8ul`.
- [ ] The UI displays the `workspacePath` returned by the backend as read-only text.
- [ ] Empty output renders a true empty state, not an error.
- [ ] Backend read failures render a visible error state while preserving the app shell.
- [ ] Search and sidebar filters are visible but inert or disabled; they do not imply implemented filtering.
- [ ] The right pane remains in the `No issue selected` empty state; clicking an issue does not implement detail behavior.
- [ ] Lucide icons are used for shell iconography.
- [ ] shadcn is only added through the shadcn CLI if reusable base components are introduced in this slice.
- [ ] Relevant frontend checks pass.

## Blocked by

- bsm-8ul

## Triage

ready-for-agent
title: Render the issue explorer shell from IssueSummary data
